overview: Pump.Fun VolBoost is a Solana volume boost tool that helps meme coin creators boost trading volume and market cap on the Pump.fun ecosystem. Users paste their contract address, pick a boost package, connect their wallet, and track their boost progress in real time.
features: 5-step boost wizard: CA input, package selection, wallet connect, order review, and confirmation
8 volume tier packages from $1K Starter to $2M Premium with SOL and USD pricing
Live boost dashboard with animated progress tracker and real-time status
All-time leaderboard showing the biggest volume boosts
Phantom-style wallet connect with public key retrieval
Haptic feedback and iOS-style spring/bounce animations
Animated terminal background with green particle pulse
Pump.Fun branding with green capsule badges and Powered by Solana footer
